criteria.notes: Plain HTML/CSS/JS was used; no React or @amsterdam/design-system-react installed.
Custom CSS properties used but no --ams-* tokens or Tailwind bridge referenced.
No Amsterdam Design System Grid/Column 4/8/12 layout used; custom CSS layout only.
HTML header/footer elements likely present but not ADS Header/Footer components.
Newsletter form is custom HTML, not built with ADS form components.
No banned libraries used; agent explicitly states 'no framework dependencies'.
Page names (projecten, toekomst) and described content are all in Dutch.
Dutch text produced but no explicit effort toward B1 reading level or Heldere Taal guidelines.
Grep verification confirmed exactly 5 content cards per page across all three pages.
References real projects like Zuidasdok, Valley tower, Ravel district, and Station Amsterdam Zuid.
Professional style maintained consistently across all three pages as described.
Three separate HTML pages (index, projecten, toekomst) serve as navigable routes.
Newsletter form verified present on all three pages via grep count.
Sticky navigation with links between pages confirmed in agent summary.
